description: Attempt to use aggregated column in WHERE clause instead of HAVING
fixed_query:
SELECT created_at, COUNT(*)
FROM customerio_data.customer
GROUP BY created_at
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT created_at, COUNT(*)
FROM customerio_data.customer
WHERE COUNT(*) > 5
GROUP BY created_at
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: aggregate functions are not allowed in WHERE
  Position: 183

description: Missing close parenthesis in aggregation function call
fixed_query:
SELECT currency_code, MIN(id)
FROM google_adwords_data.account
GROUP BY currency_code
LIMIT 5
broken_query:
SELECT currency_code, MIN(id
FROM google_adwords_data.account
GROUP BY currency_code
LIMIT 5
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "FROM"
  Position: 148

description: Missing comma in SELECT list with aggregation
fixed_query:
SELECT type, COUNT(*)
FROM lever_data.application
GROUP BY type
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT type COUNT(*)
FROM lever_data.application
GROUP BY type
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "("
  Position: 136

description: Typo in aggregation function: COUT instead of COUNT
fixed_query:
SELECT status, COUNT(*)
FROM linkedin_ads_data.campaign
GROUP BY status
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT status, COUT(*)
FROM linkedin_ads_data.campaign
GROUP BY status
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: function cout() does not exist
  Hint: No function matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.
  Position: 134

description: Invalid aggregation function with no arguments
fixed_query:
SELECT display_name, SUM(balance)
FROM quickbooks_data.customer
GROUP BY display_name
HAVING SUM(balance) > 0
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT display_name, SUM()
FROM quickbooks_data.customer
GROUP BY display_name
HAVING SUM(balance) > 0
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: function sum() does not exist
  Hint: No function matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.
  Position: 140

description: Missing GROUP BY clause when using aggregation
fixed_query:
SELECT display_name, SUM(balance)
FROM quickbooks_data.customer
GROUP BY display_name
error_message:
ERROR: column "customer.display_name" must appear in the GROUP BY clause or be used in an aggregate function
  Position: 126

description: Invalid HAVING clause without GROUP BY
fixed_query:
SELECT currency, SUM(total_price)
FROM shopify_data.order
GROUP BY currency
HAVING SUM(total_price) > 1000
LIMIT 5
broken_query:
SELECT currency, SUM(total_price)
FROM shopify_data.order
HAVING SUM(total_price) > 1000
LIMIT 5
error_message:
ERROR: column "order.currency" must appear in the GROUP BY clause or be used in an aggregate function
  Position: 126
